problem id: e5d0d497
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01100011 -> 01011111
  11000001 -> 01011100
  00010101 -> 01110101
  00011001 -> 11101101
  00111100 -> 00000111
  10100101 -> 00011110
  01100101 -> 10010111
  11100000 -> 00111110
  10001101 -> 01001100
  11100011 -> 01011110

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 01101101
